text: ... Hello, today I offer you this sophrology session to help you regulate your emotions. Maybe you sometimes feel anxious, scared, angry, sad, and that's ok. The idea is to help you notice these emotions in your body and to better release them. For that, today I will offer you a session that will help you learn to let go of the overflow. Gently, calmly, I will invite you to look all around you. Look at the room around you, the objects, and notice that you are safe. Then, when it feels right for you, very gently, I will invite you to take some breaths to come back into yourself, safely. Quietly, very gently, I will offer you exercises to help you release each of the emotions. Before we begin, I invite you to focus on an emotion that feels very intense today — maybe one or two. Try to center on these emotions and I suggest you visualize a scale of intensity between zero and ten. You will try to notice this emotion and where you feel it inside your body. Is it...
